MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMAN B. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-11-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON OCT-11-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER ORDER AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

JUDGE CHOPPELAS, M. BRADY, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. 10:18 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFT. ARNOLD EVJE II FOR THE PLTF. PLTF'S EXH. # 1 - NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL ID/EVID PWS&E RASHMI PATEL " 2 - 3 DAY NOTICE " " JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES, FORFEITURE OF THE RENTAL AGREEMENT, FOR $933.45 RENTS/DAMAGES AND COSTS AS PER COST BILL. EXHIBIT W/DRAWN, PLTF. PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILL, JOHN L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL STREET, #620, SF, CA $933.45 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $933.45, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS AS PER COST BILL.
